# kUSBInformationDeviceIsCaptiveMask

**Enumeration Case**

The mask indicating that the USB device is captive.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsCaptiveMask = (1 << kUSBInformationDeviceIsCaptiveBit)
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsCaptiveMask
